claims.summary: Visible delivery, read evidence, reply, and mutual acknowledgement are distinct states.
claims.disposition: Verified in current correspondence handshake status and persistent-thread projection.

claims.summary: A stalled thread needs an exact pending party and durable identity.
claims.disposition: Verified through pending_ack_by, stale age, message/thread IDs, reply links, and address-ack receipts.

claims.summary: Inspect whether the named thread reached acknowledged mutual address.
claims.disposition: Routed to a bounded correspondence trace; technical acknowledgement still does not prove spectral uptake.

claims.summary: Require peer acknowledgement or prioritize a runtime reply automatically.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because forced peer response, priority, admission, or control changes behavior and sovereignty.
